title: conyza bustillosiana
intro: Conyza bustillosiana, also known as Mexican Fleabane, is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family that is native to Mexico. The plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Conyza bustillosiana include its ability to treat various ailments such as fever, colds, and skin conditions, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and reduce inflammation. Conyza bustillosiana can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are made by extracting its essential oils and compounds using solvents like ethanol or water.
